Title: Osney Bridge diversion Oxford
Description: Towpath closed about 150 yards from bridge. Diversion via Abbey Road parallel to river. Reopen via Botley Road.

Title: Marsh Lock footbridge closure Henley
Description: Footbridge closed for safety. 3-mile diversion via A4155 required. 1hr 30min walk. Trains available between Henley-Shiplake. Order until 31 Jan 2026.

Title: Sandford Footbridge closure
Description: Unsafe footbridge north of Sandford Lock closed. Diversion via NCN 5 route. April 2025 announcement.

Title: Abingdon Weir walkway closure
Description: Walkway across weir closed due to corrosion. Path re-routed via Abingdon town centre. May reopen if river level is low but closes when river levels rise.

Title: Temple Footbridge closure near Marlow
Description: Closed May 2023 due to structural damage. Unlikely to reopen until 2028. Diversion via Marlow Bridge and Bisham. Central span removed Nov 2025, both side spans in poor condition.

Title: Bridge 142 closure Runnymede Egham
Description: Closed Feb 2024 after tree strike. Structural fault. Diversion via Causeway and Runnymede Roundabout. Expected until 2027. Minimal 0.6 miles added.

Title: Bell Weir Lock refurbishment diversion
Description: Small diversion around compound with construction machinery for Bell Weir lock works. Keep compound on left, soon back to river. Works spring 2026-autumn 2027.

Title: Penton Hook Island access closed
Description: No access to island due to diseased trees. Thames Path itself unaffected. Access point closed but main path continues.

Title: Streatley-Goring towpath diversion
Description: Half-mile (0.8km) diversion from eroding riverside towpath. Funding insufficient, repairs unlikely until late 2026. Path narrow and frequently floods.

Title: Brentford Grand Union Canal disruption
Description: Path blocked on left bank of Grand Union Canal between River Brent bridge and Brentford Marina. Area being redeveloped. Parts now open via alternate route via Thames Lock. No official diversion.

Title: Wallingford Weir path reopened
Description: Thames Path reopened on 1 April 2026. Previously had diversion via Preston Crowmarsh and Howbery Business Park crossing at Wallingford Bridge.
